description: add a pending child hypothesis node under a parent (the Ideate step)
rules: appends a pending node to record_store/run/.arbor/tree.json
depth-1 nodes are broad directions; depth-2+ are concrete executable interventions
warns (non-fatally) if depth exceeds the run's max_depth
usage: Set PARENT (e.g. n0 for a new direction) and HYPOTHESIS (a falsifiable claim). Output: add_node.txt. If no run exists in the store, an empty bootstrap run with root n0 is created first.
limitation: Records a hypothesis only — it does not test it, score it, or dispatch an executor. PARENT must reference an existing node id.

vars.HYPOTHESIS: Verification, not retrieval, is the bottleneck
